title: Shukrana
desc: An emotional tale of faith and gratitude, where divine intervention changes lives. As blessings unfold through trials, it's a moving reminder of hope, prayer, and destiny's plan.

title: Harjeeta
desc: A young man from a poor, dysfunctional home, dreams of winning the World Cup in hockey.

title: Laavaan Phere
desc: A young man falls in love with a woman and decides to marry her. However, his brothers-in-law and the bride's hot-headed father create complications.

title: Gaddi Jaandi Ae Chalaangaan Maardi
desc: Happy juggles his dad's dowry greed and love for Pooja, while a red car dowry sparks comic chaos, ending with a strong message against dowry practice.

title: Nikka Zaildar 4
desc: A Punjabi comedy film filled with humor, romance, and family drama, following quirky characters navigating relationships and amusing situations.
